working on a talent mapping project with Wolt again along with sourcing

MBR: Lower interview conversion isn’t a sourcing issue as pipeline and engagement are there. The main blockers are on the FTAPI side: slow/irregular feedback, limited interview capacity (only 1 TA doing interviews and being overbooked), and after she submits the candidate to ATS, they are waiting for HM to approve the first call with TA. Last minute cancellations, no shows on calls with her, oftern vague rejection reasons, which slows things down further despite a strong push on her side. So overall, conversion is lower because the process is heavy and slow, not due to lack of relevant candidates. For context, a candidate sourced in early Feb only reached final stage this week.

Started supporting Maria, and Vlad + IR. Additionaly, he has been involved in multiple projects that he has been focusing on since stopping work with Grover. MBR: Grover's contract finished during this month. Rodrigo has been supporting different TAs and has recently started working with Vlad for Aiven, so things should stabalise for next month.

40 candidates were sourced for Nenad, as he prepares to kick off a role, they will be added to Tribe dashboard and contacted later. MBR: most of her roles went through some start/stop. Roles with wolt are starting to pick up again, and for Taxfix there was a slowdown due to the contract ending, but the contract was then extended, so activity picked up again.

We have 7 finalists with Wlad for both Backend and QA, hoping for an offer!

MBR Started sourcing for a new stealth-mode project without formal job descriptions, requiring proactive market mapping and targeted outreach. Hybrid work model remains the primary hiring blocker, significantly reducing candidate interest due to office attendance requirements. After returning from one week off and facing 0 calls booked due to a role being placed on hold and the talent pool already being dry, executed a high-volume sourcing push for two new roles (350 candidates contacted, 18 responses so far) to rebuild pipeline and generate interviews. (WBR: low candidate interest in hybrid working model)
